title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at KTC Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at KTC Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!
